title: Nature Arise
body:
![Nature Arise](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DavidGmc18/Nature_Arise_PUBLIC/refs/heads/main/Gallery/Banners/nature_arise.png) [![](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/639540?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=F16436&logoSize=auto)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nature-arise) [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/sBj82FD9?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C&logoSize=auto)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nature-arise) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-grey?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoSize=auto)](https://discord.gg/qSwbXMVh6e) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/wiki-grey?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoSize=auto)](https://github.com/DavidGmc18/Nature_Arise_PUBLIC/wiki) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/report_issue-grey?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoSize=auto)](https://github.com/DavidGmc18/Nature_Arise_PUBLIC/issues)

Nature Arise is mod aimed to improve worldgen, natural part of Minecraft and add vanillish style additions. [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DavidGmc18/Nature_Arise_PUBLIC/refs/heads/main/Gallery/Banners/minecraftstorage.png)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/nature-arise) ### Content: -Biomes: Maple Forest, Mixed Forest, Fir Forest, Snowy Fir Forest, Frozen Caves -Trees: Maple tree (green, red, orange and yellow variant), Fir tree (small and big variant) -Geodes: Sapphire, Topaz -Blocks and Items: Maple and Fir wood set (+ boats), Maple syrup, Pancakes, Copper Buttons, Copper Pressure Plates, Copper Walls, Aluminium and Copper armor and tool set (+ horse armors + copper nugget + ore, deepslate ore, raw block and full block), Blueberries, Icicle and more -Mobs: Grizzly bear -AND MUCH MORE!!! -(more content will be added in future) -Why you should download this mod?: If you are looking for worldgen enchanting mod or vanilla style additions, this is it. -But why this mod and not other?: We believe, this is a quality mod. In developmnet we prioritaze quality by doing code as best as we can, making textures looking vanilla style and user friendly and more. Mainly we dont release something if we are not 100% happy and confident about it and 100% tested. -This mod is in beta development (more content is going to be added in future) If you found any bug, mistake or you think something should be done different, please create issue or comment, so we can fix or implement it. We will be happy to receive your feedback. (don’t forget to mention version of NA you are using)
